options.name: -cutOutBlockInsts
options.description: inst names needed be cut out. Without -cutOutBlockInsts: all blocks are cut out. -cutOutBlockInsts {}: all blocks are NOT cut since this pattern cannot match anything

options.name: -extendOuterX
options.description: expand the marker layer shape in X direction.

options.name: -extendOuterY
options.description: expand the marker layer shape in Y direction.

options.name: -extendX
options.description: expand the instnace boudary to cut marker layer shape in X direction.

options.name: -extendY
options.description: expand the instnace boudary to cut marker layer shape in Y direction.

options.name: -layer
options.description: the layer names which we will create the marker layer shape on it.
